title: Callista elongata
taxonomy: Callista elongata is classified as a species of sea snail in the family Veneridae. It belongs to the kingdom Animalia, the phylum Mollusca, and the class Bivalvia. The species name elongata refers to the elongated shape of the shell. Callista elongata is found in tropical and subtropical waters of the Indo-Pacific region. The classification of this species helps scientists understand its evolutionary relationships and behaviors.
